{{Expand}}

{{Infobox technique
| name = Horizon's holographic form
| introduced = lh-01-the-captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|[[Horizon's holographic form]] is drawn in four different shades.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c41">''The Captain'', chapter 41</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Techniques]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
